description: This Dart source file implements the UI screen for the home page of a note-taking application built with Flutter. It contains a stateful widget that manages the main interface, including navigation, note list, and editing panel. The file leverages state management via Provider to interact with the app's notes state and includes UI components for search, note listing, note editing, and note actions.

classes.name: HomeScreen
classes.description: Main widget representing the home page with note list and editor, handling UI layout and interactions.

classes.name: _Sidebar
classes.description: Stateless widget for the navigation sidebar, offering quick filters and navigation options.

classes.name: _NavChip
classes.description: Reusable widget representing navigation/filter chips in the sidebar.

classes.name: _NotesPanel
classes.description: Stateless widget displaying the list of notes with loading, error, and empty states.

classes.name: _EditorPanel
classes.description: Stateless widget for editing the selected note, including title, content, tags, and action buttons.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Build method for UI rendering of HomeScreen and its components.

methods.name: _Sidebar.build
methods.description: Build method for the sidebar navigation.

methods.name: _NavChip.build
methods.description: Build method for individual navigation filter chips.

methods.name: _NotesPanel.build
methods.description: Build method to display list of notes or status indicators.

methods.name: _EditorPanel.build
methods.description: Build method for the note editing interface.
